# @json-express/docs-swagger — AI Context

OpenAPI 3 documentation provider: serves Swagger UI and a generated OpenAPI spec.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/docs-swagger
```
Discovery is automatic; with docs-light also installed choose `jex.docs=@json-express/docs-swagger`. **Never import or register it.**

## Configuration (.env — case-insensitive)
| Key | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.docs.path` | `/docs` | Mount path (spec at `<path>/json`) |
| `jex.docs.baseUrl` | request-derived | `servers[0].url` override for reverse-proxy setups |

## What it unlocks
- `GET /docs` — Swagger UI (note: UI assets load from unpkg CDN — needs internet).
- `GET /docs/json` — full OpenAPI spec; request-body schemas are enriched from model `validation` blocks when `middleware-validation` is installed (agents: fetch this to learn the API).
